svg.text: TERMS & CONDITIONS OF USE — ADULTHOOD™ (Version 2026)
By continuing to exist past the age of 18, you ("the User") agree to the following terms
and conditions of Adulthood™, a product provided by Life, Inc. ("the Provider"). These
terms are non-negotiable, non-refundable, and largely unfair.
1. ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS
1.1 You did not opt in to this experience. Participation is automatic and irrevocable upon
reaching biological maturity. No confirmation email was sent. No onboarding session was
provided. You are expected to figure it out.
1.2 The Provider makes no guarantees regarding quality of experience, consistency of
outcomes, or emotional stability. Results may vary based on geography, income, genetics,
luck, and whether or not your parents had their act together.
2. PRODUCT FEATURES
2.1 Adulthood™ includes, but is not limited to: bills, taxes, back pain, existential dread,
grocery shopping, insurance premiums, and the slow realization that weekends are for
laundry. Some features (e.g., "purpose," "financial stability") are listed but may not
be available in your region or tax bracket.
2.2 Premium features such as "homeownership," "retirement," and "free time" require
additional in-life purchases and are subject to availability. The Provider reserves the
right to increase costs without notice or explanation.
3. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
3.1 The Provider is not responsible for: burnout, loneliness, student loans, the housing
market, bad managers, expired yogurt, or the feeling that everyone else has it figured
out except you. That feeling is a feature, not a bug.
3.2 Emotional damages, including but not limited to crying in your car after work, are
considered standard wear and tear and are not covered under any warranty.
4. CANCELLATION POLICY
4.1 There is no cancellation policy. There is no return window. There is no customer
support line. You may submit feedback at adulthood.fyi, but resolution is not guaranteed.
4.2 Requests to "go back to being a kid" are acknowledged but will not be processed.
5. ACKNOWLEDGMENT
5.1 By reading this, you confirm that you are, in fact, an adult. Whether you feel like
one is irrelevant. Welcome to the product. Your review matters.
© 2026 Life, Inc. All rights reserved. No rights were actually reserved for you.
